title: Care for and train working dogs
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Care for and train working dogs demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Identify workplace requirements and select working dog

pcs.text: Identify and confirm working dog requirements for the workplace
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and confirm working dog requirements for the workplace?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and confirm working dog requirements for the workplace.

pcs.text: Research suitable working dog breeds and determine availability
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Research suitable working dog breeds and determine availability?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Research suitable working dog breeds and determine availability.

pcs.text: Inspect dogs for suitability and make selection according to workplace criteria
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Inspect dogs for suitability and make selection according to workplace criteria?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Inspect dogs for suitability and make selection according to workplace criteria.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Identify workplace requirements and select working dog

elements.title: Develop and implement training program for working dog

pcs.text: Identify hazards and risks and implement safe working practices to manage risks
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify hazards and risks and implement safe working practices to manage risks?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify hazards and risks and implement safe working practices to manage risks.

pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Teach commands for working tasks?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Teach commands for working tasks.

pcs.text: Introduce the dog to a small flock or herd in a confined area
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Introduce the dog to a small flock or herd in a confined area?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Introduce the dog to a small flock or herd in a confined area.

pcs.text: Train the dog to handle larger numbers of livestock in open areas
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Train the dog to handle larger numbers of livestock in open areas?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Train the dog to handle larger numbers of livestock in open areas.

pcs.text: Train the dog on specialist skills such as backing and forcing
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Train the dog on specialist skills such as backing and forcing?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Train the dog on specialist skills such as backing and forcing.

pcs.text: Safely handle working dog, and handle livestock using good stock handling techniques and according to animal welfare practices
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Safely handle working dog, and handle livestock using good stock handling techniques and according to animal welfare practices?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Safely handle working dog, and handle livestock using good stock handling techniques and according to animal welfare practices.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Develop and implement training program for working dog

elements.title: Maintain health and welfare of working dog

pcs.text: Monitor and maintain health and condition of the working dog
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Monitor and maintain health and condition of the working dog?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor and maintain health and condition of the working dog.

pcs.text: Provide an adequate and balanced diet to meet nutritional requirements of the working dog according to workload and training program
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Provide an adequate and balanced diet to meet nutritional requirements of the working dog according to workload and training program?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Provide an adequate and balanced diet to meet nutritional requirements of the working dog according to workload and training program.

pcs.text: Seek veterinary advice and arrange for or administer preventative health treatments
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Seek veterinary advice and arrange for or administer preventative health treatments?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Seek veterinary advice and arrange for or administer preventative health treatments.

pcs.text: Provide and maintain housing facilities and equipment according to workplace animal welfare practices and requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Provide and maintain housing facilities and equipment according to workplace animal welfare practices and requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Provide and maintain housing facilities and equipment according to workplace animal welfare practices and requirements.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Maintain health and welfare of working dog

evidence_guide.description: Completed by your direct supervisor — the strongest evidence item for RPL.

evidence_guide.description: Your current position description showing duties relevant to this unit.
